governingBody: Michigan corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Michigan prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Sex involving.
note: The Michigan prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: Sex involving minor children
